claim: hour-of-day stratification removes the block_hours=4 aliasing spike

alternating_4h_adjusted.failure_mode: regression-adjustment design matrix is rank deficient

verdict: Supported for design-side stratification: alternating 4h blocks give RMSE 261 with 0% CI coverage, while stratified-daily randomization + hour/zone adjustment gives RMSE 1.86 with 94% coverage — at the daily-block anchor (RMSE 2.03). Analysis-side stratification alone is structurally impossible under strict alternation: treatment is collinear with hour-of-day, and the adjusted estimator was unidentified in 50/50 seeds.

alternating_4h_adjusted.error: regression-adjustment design matrix is rank deficient
